title: abeec Santa Operation Board Game – Festive Twist on Classic Family Fun – Kids Christmas Game Age 5+ – Buzzing Tweezers Challenge with 11 Pieces – Christmas Eve & Party Entertainment
features: Festive family fun – Play the Christmas twist on a classic operation game with a Santa game board (25.5 × 19 × 4.5 cm), complete with buzzer challenge for added excitement.
Interactive challenge – Use the magic tweezers to remove 11 festive pieces, from candy canes to gingerbread men, without touching the sides or facing the buzz.
Perfect Christmas entertainment – A hilarious board game for parties, Christmas Eve, or family gatherings, keeping kids and adults entertained together.
Complete set included – Contains 1 Santa game board, 1 operating tweezer, 11 festive pieces, and full instructions for easy set-up and play.
Great gift idea – A fun Christmas gift or stocking filler for kids aged 5+, CE tested for safety, making it ideal for family game nights and festive traditions.

No No No Reusable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Christmas Theme ✔ ✘ ✘ ✔ ✔ ✘ How many players can join? Two or more players can enjoy the game together. What batteries are required? Requires 2 x AA batteries (not included) Is it safe for children? Yes, it is CE tested and suitable for ages 5+ Can adults play too? Certainly a family board game. Its a fun electronic game challenge for both kids and grown ups. Great option for a family Christmas themed game night. What’s included in the box? The game board, tweezers, 11 festive pieces, and full instructions. Santa Operation: A Festive Twist on Classic Family Fun Looking for a Christmas game that brings the whole family together? The abeec Santa Operation game adds a festive twist to the classic operation challenge. Use the buzzer tweezers to carefully remove candy canes, gingerbread men, and other festive treats from Santa – but don’t touch the sides, or he’ll buzz! This set includes a sturdy game board (25.5 × 19 × 4.5 cm), 11 themed pieces, operating tweezers, and full instructions for quick and easy play. Perfect for Christmas Eve fun, family parties, or a silly game after Christmas dinner, it makes a brilliant gift or stocking filler for children aged 5+. Pair with other abeec family games like the Festive Games Collection or Christmas Bingo for the ultimate Christmas games night. abeec Santa Operation Game Brand abeec Category Christmas Games for Kids Product Type Family Board Game - 2 Players Age suitability 5+ Years Safety Compliance CE Tested - Adult Supervision required at all times. Players 2 + Contents 1 Santa game board, 1 tweezers, 11 festive pieces, instructions Batteries Required Requires 2 x 1.5V AA Batteries (Not Included in set) Material Plastic & electronic components Use Case Stocking Fillers for Kids, Birthday Presents, Games for Kids, Christmas Gifts for Kids, Christmas Day Games
